_comment: Hand-maintained fragment for claude/scripts/gen-agentpack.sh — everything in claude/AGENTPACK.yaml that is NOT derivable from skill/agent frontmatter. Edit this (or the frontmatter), then run the generator; never edit AGENTPACK.yaml directly.

metadata.name: Jonathan Keen — Claude Code config
metadata.description: In-place AgentPack over the dotfiles Claude Code config — references files maintained in this repo (zero duplication).

codex.notes: Shared skills and guidance compile, but Claude tool-restricted subagents are omitted and user-scope Codex sync is not yet implemented.

cursor.notes: Core instructions and skills compile, but Claude-specific agents, hooks, and plugin behavior require review.

chatgpt.notes: Portable prose and skills compile with lossy runtime behavior; hooks, local agents, and machine workflows are not preserved.

generic.notes: Used as the current Antigravity ceiling: prose and skills compile, while live hooks, MCP, plugins, and subagent semantics remain runtime-specific.

instruction_atoms.name: Global Claude Code Instructions
instruction_atoms.description: Portable global Claude Code guidance — working style, tech stack, git, verification, definition of done.

instruction_atoms.name: Multi-agent lane contract
instruction_atoms.description: How Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity work as one team on the same repo — lanes (conductor / independent verifier / runtime verification), one-owner-per-worktree, adversarial verification, and the handoff payload. Operative rules are mirrored into CLAUDE.md, codex/AGENTS.md, and antigravity/GEMINI.md.

instruction_atoms.name: Fable conduct layer
instruction_atoms.description: Operating discipline distilled from Claude Fable 5 — outcome-first final messages, readable-over-concise prose, the reversible/destructive/assessment autonomy switch, end-of-turn self-check, evidence discipline, and a pre-send checklist. Imported by CLAUDE.md so every model running this config behaves the same way.
